pr_text:
## Title: Fix buffer overflow vulnerability in tracer XY view initialization

### Summary
The `new_view_xy()` function in the tracer utility did not validate the `length` parameter before allocating internal coordinate buffers. When called with zero or negative length, `calloc(length, sizeof(float))` could produce undefined behavior or buffer overflow conditions. This vulnerability could be triggered by malformed configuration or invalid API usage, potentially causing memory corruption in gNB de
